rationale: Build on the current best transpose-quantized MLP expansion plus projection EMA path by adding an exact-function-preserving cross-layer equalization pass across each MLP hidden channel before quant-aware roundtrips and final serialization. Rebalancing `mlp.fc.weight` rows against `mlp.proj.weight` columns should reduce late-stage int8 error without spending meaningful size budget, and the script stays lean and under the 1500-line cap.
title: Cross-Layer MLP Channel Equalization Int8 Finalizer
